data.title: Whale Selling Pressure Declines in Cryptocurrency Market
data.description: Darkfost posted on X that recent data indicates a significant decrease in whale transactions within the cryptocurrency market. This decline in activity from large holders, often referred to as 'whales,' suggests a shift in market dynamics. Whales are known for their ability to influence market trends due to the substantial volume of assets they control. The reduction in their selling pressure could lead to increased market stability and potentially impact price movements. Analysts are closely monitoring these developments to assess their implications for the broader market.

data.title: Whale Engages in High-Leverage Ethereum Short Position
data.description:
On January 20, a whale executed a high-leverage short position involving 2,750 ETH, according to BlockBeats On-chain Detection. The transaction was carried out with a 25x leverage at an average price of $3,117.64 per ETH. Currently, the position is experiencing an unrealized loss of $24,000.

The address involved in this transaction is known for its aggressive trading strategy, focusing on short-term market fluctuations and active fund management.

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Potential Decline as Analyst Predicts Price Drop
data.description: Peter Brandt, a prominent trader known for predicting Bitcoin's 2018 crash, anticipates a significant decline in Bitcoin's price. According to NS3.AI, Brandt forecasts a potential drop of 33% to 37%. He identifies strong resistance near $102,300 and suggests that if bearish trends persist, the price could fall to between $58,000 and $62,000. Currently, Bitcoin is trading around $92,683 with modest daily fluctuations.

data.title: Two whales established ETH long positions worth $31.18 million and ETH short positions worth $11.96 million respectively on HyperLiquid.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale (0xfB6...) deposited $6.39 million USDC into HyperLiquid and opened a 12x leveraged long position in ETH, worth $31.18 million. Simultaneously, another whale (0x460...) deposited $3 million USDC into HyperLiquid and opened a 4x leveraged short position in ETH, worth $11.96 million.

data.title: Ripple CEO Responds to XRP Price Decline with Optimism
data.description: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse has subtly addressed concerns regarding the recent drop in XRP prices by engaging with social media posts that question investor anxiety. According to NS3.AI, despite XRP falling below $2 amid a wider cryptocurrency market downturn, Garlinghouse's public remarks and social media activity indicate confidence in the asset's future. He highlighted robust institutional investments, with XRP exchange-traded funds raising over $700 million. This suggests that Ripple's leadership perceives the current volatility as temporary, fostering a cautiously optimistic sentiment among investors.

data.title: Mind Network Launches x402z Testnet for Enhanced Privacy in AI Economy
data.description: Mind Network has launched the x402z testnet, focusing on fully homomorphic encryption (FHE) for enhanced privacy. According to Foresight News, this development aims to introduce privacy protection within the artificial intelligence economy. The platform allows agents to conduct transactions without revealing their intentions, marking a significant step in secure data handling.

data.title: Pundi AI Integration with Bella Protocol: Enhancing AI-Driven Trading and Research Capabilities
data.description: Pundi AI announced its integration with Bella Protocol, combining Bella's AI trading signals and market research tools with Pundi AI's decentralized data infrastructure to drive the practical application of AI agents in decentralized environments. Through this collaboration, Pundi AI can access the Bella Signal Bot API, using perpetual trading signals for specific token pairs, including long/short and liquidation indicators, to help developers and AI agents explore real-time trading strategies and market analysis. Furthermore, the Bella Research Bot (a Telegram AI assistant based on a large language model) can display Pundi AI-related information, such as product updates, ecosystem activities, and data content, providing users with a convenient interactive experience. This integration demonstrates the crucial role of AI-driven infrastructure in supporting transparent and accessible on-chain applications, aligning with Pundi AI's mission to transform data into on-chain intellectual property and promote open participation in the AI ​​economy. In the future, both parties will explore more innovative AI applications to further expand the Web3 ecosystem. data.title: Sellers Attack on Two Fronts: Derivatives and Spot
data.description:
Sellers have regained control on derivatives after several weeks of buyer dominance, while US spot is not providing counter-demand - both signals point to a risk-off regime.
source: https://axeladlerjr.com/sellers-attack-on-two-fronts-derivatives-and-spot/

data.title: Hong Kong Securities Body Pushes Back On Tighter Crypto Licensing Rules
data.description:
Hong Kong’s securities industry is urging regulators to keep a limited crypto exemption, warning tougher rules could put off traditional asset managers.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/hong-kong-securities-group-opposes-tighter-crypto-rules/

data.title: IMF Projects 3.3% Global Growth in 2026 as AI Investment Supports Recovery
data.description:
The IMF forecasts 3. 3% global growth in 2026, driven by AI investment and easing trade tensions, while risks from tariffs, market corrections, and geopolitical tensions persist.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/special-reports/imf-projects-3-3-global-growth-in-2026-as-ai-investment-supports-recovery/

data.title: Binance Alpha will list FIGHT on January 22.
data.description: Binance Wallet announced that Binance Alpha will launch the FIGHT (FIGHT) token on January 22nd. Eligible users can claim the airdrop using Binance Alpha Points on the Alpha Events page after trading opens. Specific rules and further details will be announced separately. Please follow Binance's official channels for the latest updates.

data.title: X Algorithm “Is Dumb,” Musk Says as Platform Fully Open-Sources Its Ranking System
data.description:
Elon Musk openly criticized the X algorithm as “dumb” while simultaneously releasing the platform’s Grok-powered ranking system as fully open-source.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2026/01/20/x-algorithm-dumb-says-elon-musk/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=x-algorithm-dumb-says-elon-musk

data.title: Pudgy Penguins Price Tests Key Support – Here Is Why $0.010 Matters
data.description:
The Pudgy Penguins are currently undergoing price tests at a crucial support level, and it is essential to understand the significance of the $0.010 mark in this context. This price point is not just a numerical threshold; it serves as a critical indicator of market sentiment and potential buying or selling pressure. Should the price remain above this support level, it may signal continued bullish momentum, while a fall below it could indicate bearish trends and uncertainty among investors. Analyzing the factors contributing to this situation will provide deeper insights into the asset's future trajectory and potential implications for traders and holders alike.
source: https://blocknews.com/pudgy-penguins-price-tests-key-support-here-is-why-0-010-matters/
